cinema.name: Cinema C
cinema.description: Welcome to the Hermetic International Film Festival 2026!
cinema.instructions:
INSTRUCTIONS

Desktop

• Mouse to look around | [Esc] to release

• [W][A][S][D] or [←][↑][↓][→] to move

• Point on a poster to watch Movie

Mobile

• Drag to look around

• Touch the on-screen to move

• Point on a poster to watch Movie

works.title: Melodies Of The Abyss 2026
works.description:
Melodies of the Abyss unfolds as a brooding supernatural psycho-thriller, daring to imagine an intimate confrontation between Kurt Cobain and Courtney Love—or is it Lucifer Morningstar?
Inspired by the final, chaotic week of Kurt’s life, the narrative threads together two figures gripped by existential despair—one mortal, one divine.
Kurt seeks escape from the weight of a desperate pact that shattered more than just himself. What he truly needs is the courage to face its lingering shadows and reclaim what may still be redeemed. Lucifer, cast down in defiance, longs to rage against the heavens—but beneath the fury lies a yearning for the love of the God who cast him out.
With fractured memory as its canvas and spiritual unrest as its undercurrent, the film explores suffering not merely as consequence, but as communion—between abandonment and yearning, rebellion and redemption.

works.title: Pale Magic
works.description: Margot is a rising college senior, house sitting for one of her professors. When her boyfriend, Taylor, gets the munchies and eats an enchanted cookie from the professor’s off-limits pantry, he is inadvertently possessed by the spirit of Talifex, an ancient alchemist and chaos sorcerer. Now Margot needs to work with Talifex in order to reverse the magic and get her boyfriend back, but Talifex has his own motives and no intention of going back where he came from.

works.title: Psychonaut
works.description:
A rite goes wrong on the left-hand path.
* * *
An analog analogy for our digital dystopia, of disappearing
Down the black holes that we peer in: 
A No Wave necromantic metaphor
For what the likes of OpenAI and Meta are for.
This mutoscopic mutation in 16mm monochrome 
Is a 60-second psychodrama, silent as the catacombs.

works.title: Quantum Qi
works.description: Quantum Qi: The Taoist Art of Nurturing Life is a cinematic journey into the living intelligence of Qi—the vital life force that animates all of existence. Featuring 27 globally revered masters, scholars, and healers from the worlds of Qigong, Tai Chi, Martial Arts and Traditional Chinese Medicine, this spellbinding documentary bridges ancient Taoist wisdom with emerging paradigms in integrative health and energy medicine.

works.title: Reddening
works.description:
REDDENING is a genre-bender arthouse fantasy film, at the intersection of contemporary performance and experimental fiction.
The title REDDENING refers to the final stage of alchemy; Rubedo, in which the alchemical transformation takes place. 
Historically, the practice of alchemy aimed turning base metals into silver and gold, but further, to reach Magnum Opus; divine illumination, heavenly bliss and the elixir of life. 
Different disciplines considered the alchemical transformation to take place in the stratum relevant to them; materia, psyche, spirit. Nonetheless, for the transformation to occur, alchemists had to go through a transmutation themselves.
REDDENING explores how a film, as a sensuous object, can pleasure; repulse, nurture, and overall transmute the body of the audience.

works.title: reEarth
works.description:
reEarth ...Rights of Nature – Bettina Behrend founded in 1988 the Save the Rainforest Association with Reinhard Behrend, which supports indigenous peoples worldwide in protecting rainforests. She is the first chairwoman of the association.
She is a visionary and artist. Her awareness of the deep connection comes from many years of Zen meditation. While studying at Sage University, she was able to further develop her sense of deep connection in art. She received her PhD in Creative Arts for creating new spaces by combining music - dance - painting.
She summarizes experiences of healing and self-empowerment in the book “Meeting the Wild Child”. It invites you to find your way back to the wonder of your inner child.
The film project is intended to directly help us connect with Mother Earth from the heart. Aerne Ness, PhD developed deep ecology as a professor at the University of Oslo. John Seed has applied this philosophy in seminars to create an awareness of earth connection among participants. The ecological crisis lies in the fact that we feel separated from Mother Earth. We need ecological identity! The documentary ‚Rights of Nature’ serves this goal.

works.title: Sumarsolstodur
works.description:
In a world where art and reality collide, Miho’s vivid dreams reveal the cosmic force of the Architecture, uniting her with artists across the globe in a desperate battle to heal the universe.
Miho, a Japanese art researcher, begins experiencing vivid dreams that draw her into another dimension, linking her present reality to the trauma of Hiroshima and environmental concerns. She discovers an ancient force called the Architecture, responsible for guiding planetary evolution, that has been disrupted by dark forces. 
Artists worldwide, connected to beings called Synesthetes, start experiencing the same dreams and join a cosmic battle to repair the universe. In a final performance, they attempt to heal the cosmic rift, channeling their creativity to reshape reality itself. 
The line between dream and reality continues to fade, leaving everyone questioning: is the story real, or merely a fantastical illusion? One thing is certain—after this journey, nothing will ever be the same again.

works.title: Hermetic Film Festival
works.description: We want to celebrate the visions - cinematography and Hermetica are both terrific imaginatively visionary cultures. Contemporary esotericism is intimately, and increasingly, connected with popular culture and new media: for this reason, we want to support such a visual fascination, the storylines revolving around neglected knowledge and the frantic search for the divine upon hidden paths of spirituality.

works.title: Holy Mountain Gallery
works.description: The Holy Mountain Gallery is the official venue partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival. “The Holy” is currently developing an Infinite Virtual Museum and a global Map of Artists. Check it out for exhibitions and more.

works.title: Sacrisoft
works.description: Sacrisoft is the official technical partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival and developed this virtual cinema. The company creates a wide range of innovative independent software, including a Landing Page Creator for your next film project, a Video Art Remix Machine, and an awesome Movie Poster Maker. These tools will be available worldwide soon, so stay tuned.

works.title: Gifigo
works.description: Gifigo is the official media partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival, publishing festival reviews and fresh insights on tech, culture, and society on the go.

works.title: Lucid Lake Institute
works.description: The Lucid Lake Institute is the official research partner of the Hermetic International Film Festival and is dedicated to the study of Western Esotericism and Quantum Philosophy.

works.title: The Contact
works.description: The UFO phenomenon and the subject of extraterrestrial life have been examined in many television programs and films within the boundaries of science fiction. On the other hand, especially in recent years, the developments in space technologies and the intense interest of scientists in planets other than Earth have led to the production of many documentaries on ufology. The documentary Contact is the first documentary to address the cases of extraterrestrial life in Anatolia. In the documentary, the historical formation of the contact cases experienced in Turkey is examined in the context of the reality dimension of the ufology phenomenon. The story of the documentary Contact is addressed in a multifaceted manner, from ancient structures in Anatolia to historical events and UFO videos to individual contacts. The documentary Contact is based on the experiences and opinions of distinguished academics, retired officers, archaeologists, art historians, television broadcasters, journalists, UFO researchers, metaphysics experts, and contactees who have had contact with extraterrestrial beings.

works.title: The Deep Dive
works.description: Pennsylvanian independent filmmaker Blair Murphy goes nuts exploring Shakespeare... and hits the jackpot.

works.title: The Dreaming Man
works.description: Trapped in a timeless limbo, a man journeys through dreams that feel more real than reality itself. Each vision pulls him deeper into the layers of his unconscious, where mysterious presences, suspended landscapes, and ancient symbols reveal fragments of a hidden truth. The Man Who Dreams is a silent passage through the soul — a visual rite blending memory, desire, and fate.
